content:
IVX HOLDINGS — BUILD ONE COMPLETE APP, NOT A VERCEL-ONLY APP

IMPORTANT CORRECTION

The Vercel Exit Command Center is NOT a separate application.

It is one Owner/Admin module inside the complete IVX Holdings real estate platform.

Build and deliver ONE unified Android application containing:

1. Full IVX Holdings real estate app
2. Owner login
3. Member registration and login
4. Investors
5. Buyers
6. Properties
7. Deals
8. Feed
9. Reels
10. Media uploads
11. Chat and realtime
12. IVX Owner AI
13. 12 AI developer dashboard
14. Vercel Exit Command Center
15. Owner/Admin dashboards
16. Revenue and transactions
17. Analytics
18. Settings
19. Notifications
20. All existing IVX modules

Do not generate an APK containing only the Vercel dashboard.

==================================================
PHASE 1 — AUDIT THE BUILD ENTRY POINT
==================================================

Verify which project, app directory, Expo configuration, Android project and navigation root are being used to generate the APK.

Return:

- Repository
- Branch
- App root
- Expo app path
- Android project path
- package.json used
- app.config.ts or app.json used
- Expo Router root
- Main navigation layout
- Android package name
- Build profile
- Files included in the final bundle

Confirm the build starts from the COMPLETE IVX application.

Do not use a dashboard-only folder, test app, migration app, temporary shell or isolated Vercel module as the APK entry point.

==================================================
PHASE 2 — UNIFIED NAVIGATION
==================================================

The final app must include the normal IVX navigation and the Vercel dashboard as an Owner-only route.

Required navigation structure:

PUBLIC / MEMBER APP
- Home
- Feed
- Properties
- Deals
- Reels
- Search
- Messages
- Notifications
- Profile
- Registration
- Login

OWNER / ADMIN
- Owner Dashboard
- Members
- Investors
- Buyers
- Properties
- Deals
- Revenue
- Transactions
- Analytics
- Variables
- Deployments
- AI Engineering Command Center
- Vercel Exit Command Center
- Security
- Settings
- Logs

The Vercel Exit Command Center must be accessible at:

Admin
→ IVX Engineering
→ Vercel Exit Command Center

It must not replace the app home screen.

==================================================
PHASE 3 — VERIFY ALL EXISTING MODULES
==================================================

Before building, verify these modules are registered and reachable:

- Owner login
- Member login
- Registration
- Feed
- Properties
- Deals
- Reels
- Chat
- Media
- Notifications
- Profiles
- Investors
- Buyers
- Owner AI
- AI Engineering Command Center
- Vercel Exit Command Center
- Revenue
- Transactions
- Analytics
- Settings

Return the route path and source file for every module.

If any existing module is missing from the current build, restore it before generating the APK.

==================================================
PHASE 4 — REMOVE DASHBOARD-ONLY BUILD CONFIGURATION
==================================================

Search for and remove any configuration that causes the app to open only the Vercel dashboard, including:

- Temporary initialRouteName
- Dashboard-only Expo entry
- Test navigation root
- Migration-only app shell
- Conditional render that hides the full application
- Hardcoded redirect to Vercel Exit Command Center
- Build profile using the wrong app directory
- Duplicate app.config.ts
- Duplicate package.json
- Wrong Android source set
- Wrong Expo Router root

The normal IVX Home screen must remain the default app entry.

Owner-only modules must appear only after authenticated Owner access.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — DATA AND BACKEND CONNECTIONS
==================================================

Verify the unified app connects to the real IVX production services:

- IVX backend
- Supabase
- Realtime
- Storage
- Owner AI
- Notifications
- Redis/workers where applicable
- Current production API base URL

Do not use isolated mock data or a separate Vercel migration database.

==================================================
PHASE 6 — BUILD THE COMPLETE APK
==================================================

Generate a new Android release APK from the complete IVX Holdings app.

Use a new versionCode.

Required filename:

ivx-holdings-full-v1.4.3-build12.apk

or the next valid build number.

The APK must contain:

- Full IVX real estate application
- All member-facing modules
- All owner/admin modules
- IVX Owner AI
- AI developer dashboard
- Vercel Exit Command Center
- Current timeout fixes
- Current production API configuration
- No dashboard-only entry point

==================================================
PHASE 7 — APK CONTENT VERIFICATION
==================================================

Inspect the actual built APK bundle and prove it contains routes/components for:

- Home
- Feed
- Properties
- Deals
- Reels
- Chat
- Members
- Investors
- Buyers
- Owner Dashboard
- IVX Owner AI
- AI Engineering Command Center
- Vercel Exit Command Center
- Revenue
- Analytics
- Settings

Also verify:

- Correct app name
- Correct icon
- Correct package name
- Correct version
- Correct embedded Git SHA
- Correct API URL
- Correct navigation root
- No isolated dashboard shell

==================================================
PHASE 8 — END-TO-END QA
==================================================

Test the complete app, not only the Vercel module.

Required tests:

1. App opens to normal IVX home/login
2. Owner login works
3. Member login works
4. Feed loads
5. Properties load
6. Deals load
7. Reels load
8. Chat works
9. Media upload works
10. Owner AI responds
11. Owner Dashboard opens
12. AI Engineering Command Center opens
13. Vercel Exit Command Center opens
14. Back navigation works
15. Logout returns to public app
16. App restart preserves correct session
17. No route redirects every user to Vercel dashboard
18. No module is missing

==================================================
PHASE 9 — PRODUCTION SYNCHRONIZATION
==================================================

Verify:

GitHub HEAD
=
Render Live SHA
=
/version SHA
=
APK embedded SHA

Return exact evidence.

==================================================
PHASE 10 — FINAL DELIVERY
==================================================

Return only:

1. Confirmation that this is one unified IVX app
2. Complete module count
3. Route inventory
4. App entry point
5. APK filename
6. Version
7. versionCode
8. Package name
9. APK SHA-256
10. Embedded Git SHA
11. GitHub SHA
12. Render SHA
13. Deployment ID
14. Test results
15. Direct APK attachment or public HTTPS download link

FINAL ACCEPTANCE

Do not mark complete unless:

- The APK opens the full IVX Holdings real estate app
- The Vercel dashboard is only one Owner/Admin module
- All existing IVX modules are included
- The APK is built from the correct full-app root
- All routes are verified
- GitHub, Render, /version and APK SHA match
- The APK is directly downloadable

Do not return another Vercel-only build.
Build the complete IVX Holdings application now.
